headline: SLB Q1 Deep Dive: Middle East Disruption Offsets Growth in Digital and Production Systems
summary: Oilfield services provider SLB (NYSE:SLB) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, but sales fell by 6.3% year on year to $8.72 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.52 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: SLB Q1 Deep Dive: Middle East Disruption Offsets Growth in Digital and Production Systems
